udt_union_v0.name: Asset

function_v0.doc: Get all registered tokens as a Vec.
function_v0.name: get_tokens

function_v0.doc: Replace the entire token list. Admin only.\nClears existing list and sets new tokens. Skips duplicates silently.
function_v0.name: set_tokens

function_v0.doc:
Get all position values for an account's direct token holdings.

Phase 1 \xe2\x80\x94 Oracle-driven discovery:
Calls `oracle_registry.get_feeds_paginated(0, MAX_TRACKED_FEEDS)` and iterates over
the returned feed list.  Disabled feeds and non-Stellar assets are skipped.
ALL cross-contract calls use `try_invoke_contract` \xe2\x80\x94 any error causes that token to be
silently skipped rather than panicking the entire call (B-3 fix).

Phase 2 \xe2\x80\x94 Manual list union:
Also iterates the manually-registered `tok_cnt`/`(tok, i)` tokens.  Tokens already
discovered in Phase 1 are deduplicated by address.  Same `try_invoke` / skip-on-error
logic applies.

`enabled_position_ids` \xe2\x80\x94 HIGH-03 fix: used to filter which manual-list token indices are
included.  Each token registered at adapter index `i` corresponds to position_id Symbol
`INDEX_STRS[i]`.  If the list is empty all manual tokens are returned (backward-compatible).

# Panics
Panics only if arithmetic overflows in `process_token_position` (checked_mul failure).
function_v0.name: get_all_pos

function_v0.doc:
Accept a pending admin proposal (step 2 of two-step transfer).

Must be called by the `pending_admin` address. Overwrites the current admin
with `pending_admin` and clears the pending slot.
function_v0.name: accept_admin

function_v0.doc: Remove a token from the tracked list. Admin only.\nDoes NOT preserve order \xe2\x80\x94 swaps last token into the removed slot.
function_v0.name: remove_token

function_v0.doc:
Propose a new admin (step 1 of two-step transfer). Admin only. (MEDIUM-01)

Writes the `pend_admin` storage key but does NOT overwrite the current admin.
The new admin must call `accept_admin()` to complete the transfer.
This prevents permanent lock-out from a typo or misrouted address.
function_v0.name: propose_admin

function_v0.doc: Register a token to track. Admin only.
function_v0.name: register_token

function_v0.doc: Get token at a specific index.
function_v0.name: get_token_at_index

function_v0.doc: Register multiple tokens at once. Admin only. Skips duplicates silently.
function_v0.name: register_tokens_batch
